description_long: This is a rugged, military-style backpack equipped for outdoor or survival use, featuring a dark green main body with a large cylindrical bedroll or sleeping bag strapped to the top. A red-bladed axe is securely fastened vertically along one side, while a blue canister and a round metal pan are attached to the lower sides. The front of the backpack displays two prominent black straps with buckles, and there are additional small items such as bottles and a red book or box tucked into side compartments. The back is plain with two wide shoulder straps, and the overall construction appears robust and functional, designed for heavy-duty carrying. The materials suggest a combination of durable fabric, metal, and plastic, with reinforced stitching and attachment points for gear. This backpack is well-suited for urban explorers, emergency responders, or outdoor enthusiasts navigating city parks or abandoned structures.
description: A heavy-duty, dark green backpack with a bedroll, axe, canister, and pan attached, featuring multiple compartments and robust straps. Designed for survival or outdoor use in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main compartment, two black straps with buckles, a bedroll on top, axe on the left, blue canister on the right, and a round pan attached to the lower right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the axe's full length, the cylindrical bedroll, and small items (bottles, red box) in a side pocket.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain back panel with two wide shoulder straps and the bedroll on top, with attachments less visible.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the axe handle, blue canister, and the round pan, with the bedroll and main compartment visible from the side.
attribute_strap_design: Two wide, adjustable black shoulder straps on the back, two front securing straps with buckles, and additional attachment straps for gear.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One main compartment, one left side pocket with small items, one right side holder for a canister, and external attachment points for an axe and pan.
